page.title: Notifications
page.subtitle: Automatic messages sent to your customers when they collect stamps or unlock rewards

icon.title: Notification icon
icon.description: Shown on your customers' lock screen when they receive a notification from your loyalty card
icon.lockedHint: Upgrade to Growth to use a branded notification icon

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: A staff member scans the customer's loyalty card.
howItWorks.step2: Their wallet pass silently refreshes in the background.
howItWorks.step3: The customer sees the notification on their lock screen.
howItWorks.note: Notifications are delivered directly through Apple Wallet — no app install required.

variablesReference.title: Available variables
variablesReference.description: Use these placeholders in your message. They will be replaced with real values when the notification is sent.

triggers.sectionDescription: These messages are sent automatically when a customer collects a stamp or earns a reward

stamp_added.name: Stamp collected
stamp_added.description: Sent when a customer collects a new stamp

reward_earned.name: Reward unlocked
reward_earned.description: Sent when a customer completes their card and earns a reward

reward_redeemed.name: Reward redeemed
reward_redeemed.description: Sent when a customer redeems their reward

milestone.name: Milestone
milestone.description: Sent when a customer reaches a specific stamp count

near_reward.name: Near reward
near_reward.description: Sent when a customer is close to unlocking their reward

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.description: Send a special message when a customer reaches a specific stamp count
milestones.empty: No milestones yet. Add one to send a custom message at a specific stamp count.
milestones.limitReached: You've reached the milestone limit for Growth. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited milestones.
milestones.createDescription: Send a custom notification when customers hit a specific stamp count.
milestones.editDescription: Update the stamp count or the message for this milestone.
milestones.deleteConfirmDescription: This milestone will stop firing for all customers.

errors.duplicate: A milestone at this stamp count already exists.
errors.quotaExceeded: You've reached your milestone limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited milestones.
errors.invalidStampCount: Stamp count must be a positive number.

nearReward.title: Near-reward notification
nearReward.description: Notify the customer when they are a few stamps away from unlocking their reward

editor.disabledHint: When disabled, the loyalty card still updates silently — customers just don't see a notification for this event.
editor.rewardNameMissing: Define a reward in your program settings to use this variable.

plan.starterReadOnly: These are the default messages. Upgrade to customize the wording.

page.title: Broadcasts
page.subtitle: Send promotional messages directly to all your customers' wallets

empty.title: No broadcasts yet
empty.description: Create your first broadcast to reach every customer at once.

drafts.title: No drafts
drafts.description: Drafts you save will show up here.

scheduled.title: No scheduled broadcasts
scheduled.description: Schedule a broadcast to see it here.

sent.title: No broadcasts sent yet
sent.description: Your send history will show up here.

howItWorks.delivery: Customers get the notification right inside their wallet.

appleNote.title: Note about Apple Wallet
appleNote.body: Apple recommends against using wallet passes for unsolicited marketing. In practice, broadcasts work without issue — just make sure you only message customers who voluntarily joined your loyalty program.

quota.reached: Monthly limit reached. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited broadcasts.

compose.title: Compose your broadcast
compose.subtitle: A title and a short message is all you need. Translate to English if you like — customers see the language that matches their phone.
compose.translationHint: If you don't add a translation, every customer sees the default version regardless of their language.

audience.title: Who will receive this?
audience.subtitle: Choose everyone or narrow down by activity.
audience.allDescription: Every customer with a wallet card
audience.filteredDescription: Pick who receives this by activity

filters.enrolled_before_days: Enrolled more than N days ago
filters.enrolled_after_days: Enrolled within the last N days

schedule.title: When should we send it?
schedule.subtitle: Send right away, or pick a date and time inside your business hours.
schedule.sendNowDescription: Customers will receive this right away
schedule.windowError: Broadcasts can only be scheduled between 9:00 and 20:00 ({tz})
schedule.pastError: Scheduled time must be in the future

review.title: Review and send
review.subtitle: A final look before you blast this out.
review.quotaNote: This will use 1 of your {max} monthly broadcasts
review.confirmSendNowBody: This cannot be undone. Customers will receive the notification immediately.
review.confirmSendScheduleBody: This cannot be undone. The broadcast will be sent at the scheduled time.

starter.headline: Reach every customer at once
starter.description: Send a broadcast to all your loyal customers — a new menu, a flash sale, a holiday reminder. Right to their wallet, no app install needed.

errors.quotaExceeded: You've used all your broadcasts this month. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited broadcasts.
errors.scheduleOutOfWindow: Broadcasts can only be scheduled between 9:00 and 20:00.

downgradeBanner.title: Your Growth plan ended
downgradeBanner.description: {count, plural, =0 {Custom templates are disabled.} one {# scheduled message was cancelled and custom templates are disabled.} other {# scheduled messages were cancelled and custom templates are disabled.}}
